name: CLARCOR, Inc.
description: CLARCOR, Inc. was a leading global provider of filtration products, systems, and services, catering to a diverse range of industrial and mobile applications. The company manufactured and marketed industrial and environmental filtration products, as well as engine and mobile filtration products, including oil, fuel, and air filters. In February 2017, CLARCOR was acquired by Parker Hannifin Corporation, a global leader in motion and control technologies, and its operations were integrated into Parker's Filtration Group.
